results.title: 01 eat center wear peel
results.prompt: Use case: ads-marketing. Image 1 controls Raul and Meg identity, clothing, and product but not the park location; place them together in football bleachers. Image 2 supports Raul's face and orange anime energy. Image 3 supplies only the broad idea of armor assembled around Raul; reject its blocky pixel design and empty orange background. Raul pops the soft center of one peeled mango gummy into his mouth while its long curled golden outer layer spirals up one arm and visibly flattens into glossy translucent shoulder and forearm plates. Meg and nearby students react in awe. Show center entering mouth, continuous peel, and newly formed armor in one readable frame.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Create one polished cinematic Peelerz commercial styleframe, never a collage or storyboard grid. Follow each prompt's stated reference roles. Raul's flavor is mango-orange. Meg's working flavor is acid-green apple. Mango minions are energetic translucent gummy hype-men; Meg has exactly one sardonic green gummy imp. Preserve live-action teenage identities while using anime energy or tactile candy characters where requested. Mouth-passage imagery must remain wholly confectionary and never anatomical. results.title: 07 meg not impressed
results.prompt: Use case: ads-marketing. Image 1 controls Raul and Meg identity and seating relationship but move them to crowded football bleachers. Image 2 supplies the enormous orange anime transformation around Raul. Image 3 supports Meg's face only; reject its extreme wide-angle mouth crop. Create a comedic two-depth frame. Raul transforms amid orange lightning in the middle background while foreground Meg calmly eats her acid-green apple gummy and raises one eyebrow, dry and almost unimpressed. Keep both characters legible. No boredom, phone, contempt, extra green creature, isolated portrait, or park setting.

results.title: 08 green imp arrives
results.prompt: Use case: ads-marketing. Preserve Meg's blonde identity and yellow outfit from the references but place her among crowded football bleachers in soft evening stadium light. Create an intimate medium frame. Exactly one small acid-green translucent gummy imp with tiny hands sits upright on Meg's knee and looks up at her. Meg looks back with dry curiosity. Other spectators continue watching the game and do not notice the imp. Make it charming, sardonic, jewel-like candy—not a demon, frog, baby mascot, plush toy, or green swarm.

results.title: 09 green imp dives in
results.prompt: Use case: ads-marketing. Preserve Meg's identity from both references and relocate her to football bleachers at night. Create a dynamic tasteful macro frame. Meg holds her hand raised near her face while the single glowing green gummy imp performs a joyful swan dive from her palm toward her smiling open mouth. Its tiny body and extended arms remain fully visible; one short green light arc traces the motion. Stadium lights and crowd form soft bokeh. No literal falling human, fear, forced feeding, giant mouth, visible throat, tongue emphasis, or extra imps.

No teeth, tongue, throat, flesh, cave stone, intestinal imagery, underwater ocean, or extra creature.
